---
title: "Edith C. Rickards"
---

## Edith C. Rickards

### Description

children’s writer, biographer of Felicia Skene and Zoe Thomson, contributor to <i>MP</i> 1891

### Biography

She was  probably Edith Cordelia Rickards (b. 1846/7), daughter of George Rickards, barrister;  her mother Frances Lefroy (1811-1859) was a cousin of Fanny Caroline Lefroy’s.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
